results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is a platform that allows developers to create, manage, and share Agent Skills to extend and customize the functionalities of the Claude AI.

results.title: Superpowers
results.description: Superpowers provides Claude Code with a comprehensive skills library, including testing, debugging, collaboration, and meta skills, via a plugin that manages and loads skills from a dedicated repository.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is a command-line tool for agentic coding that integrates Claude into developer workflows, offering a flexible and customizable platform for best practices across various codebases and environments.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is an intelligent AI programming assistant designed to enhance developer efficiency and code quality through features like smart code understanding, real-time pair programming, and AI-assisted debugging.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is a command-line interface and web-based tool that enables developers to interact with Claude AI for code analysis, generation, and debugging with interactive REPL capabilities.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is an agentic terminal tool that understands your codebase to help you code faster by executing tasks, explaining code, and handling git workflows through natural language commands.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is Anthropic’s agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, helping developers turn ideas into code faster by building features, debugging issues, navigating codebases, and automating tedious tasks.

results.title: Awesome Claude Skills
results.description: Awesome Claude Skills is a curated collection of practical, customizable Claude Skills—workflows for Claude.ai, Claude Code, and the Claude API—that accelerate document processing, development, analysis, creative tasks, and integrations, with guides for creating and contributing skills.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal and helps developers build features, debug issues, and automate tasks using AI.

results.title: Claude Code Tresor
results.description: Claude Code Tresor is a comprehensive collection of professional-grade utilities for Claude Code users, offering autonomous skills, expert agents, slash commands, and prompts to supercharge development workflows.

results.title: Awesome Claude Code
results.description: A curated list of slash-commands, CLAUDE.md files, CLI tools, and other resources to enhance Claude Code workflows and productivity.

results.title: Claude Agent SDK
results.description: The Claude Agent SDK enables programmatic building of AI agents with Claude Code's capabilities, allowing them to understand codebases, edit files, run commands, and execute complex workflows.

results.title: Claude Code Unified Agents
results.description: A comprehensive collection of 54 specialized Claude Code sub-agents covering development, infrastructure, quality, AI/ML, business, creative, and specialized domains, featuring smart orchestration and deep specialization.

results.title: Claude Code Agent Development Kit
results.description: A Python framework for building Claude Code agents with custom tools, leveraging Claude Code's reasoning capabilities in Docker-isolated environments for production workflows.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is an AI coding assistant (CLI tool) that helps developers with various coding tasks, providing contextual information and best practices based on its documentation.

results.title: Claude Code Tools
results.description: A collection of tools, hooks, and utilities designed to enhance Claude Code and other CLI coding agents, enabling programmatic control over terminal applications.

results.title: Claude Code Flow
results.description: This mode serves as a code-first orchestration layer, enabling Claude to write, edit, test, and optimize code autonomously across recursive agent cycles.

results.title: Claude Code MCP Enhanced
results.description: An enhanced Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for running Claude Code with bypassed permissions, offering advanced task orchestration, reliability improvements, and direct file editing capabilities.

results.title: Claude Squad
results.description: Claude Squad is a terminal application that manages multiple AI code agents like Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini in separate workspaces, enabling simultaneous task management with isolated git environments.

results.title: Awesome Claude Agents
results.description: Supercharge Claude Code with a team of specialized AI agents that work together to build features, debug issues, and handle technology stacks with expert-level knowledge.

results.title: Claude Code for n8n
results.description: Integrate Claude Code, an AI coding assistant, into n8n workflows to automate code analysis, bug fixing, feature development, database management, API interaction, and more.

results.title: Office Document Skills for Claude Code
results.description: This project provides professional Office document creation and editing workflows for the command line, powered by Claude Code, supporting formats like PPTX, DOCX, XLSX, and PDF for automation and custom workflows.

results.title: Claude
results.description: Claude is an advanced AI model providing an API that enables sophisticated natural language processing tasks through features like large context windows, agent skills, batch processing, and external tool integration.

results.title: Claude Code Neovim IDE Extension
results.description: claudecode.nvim is a Neovim IDE integration for Claude Code, bringing Anthropic's AI coding assistant to Neovim with a pure Lua implementation and full protocol compatibility.

results.title: Claude Code for n8n
results.description: Integrates Claude Code's AI coding capabilities into n8n workflows for automated code reviews, bug fixing, database management, and more.

results.title: Claude Code Cookbook
results.description: A collection of settings and custom commands to enhance the usability of Claude Code, allowing it to automate tasks like code modification, test execution, and documentation updates.

results.title: Claude Command Suite
results.description: Claude Command Suite is a powerful collection of 148+ custom slash commands, 54 intelligent AI agents, and automated workflows designed to transform Claude Code into an ultimate development partner, providing structured, repeatable workflows for modern software development.

results.title: Claude Code ACP
results.description: This tool implements an ACP agent for Claude Code, enabling integration with ACP-compatible clients like Zed and supporting features such as context mentions, images, tool calls, and interactive terminals.

results.title: Claude Code Subagents & Commands Collection
results.description: A comprehensive collection of specialized AI subagents and slash commands for Claude Code, designed to enhance development workflows with domain-specific expertise and powerful automation, now featuring a Web UI and CLI tool.

results.title: Claude Code Subagents
results.description: A collection of specialized AI subagents designed to enhance development workflows with domain-specific expertise for Claude Code.
